description: Added /ai-health-analysis/ card to homepage Guides & Resources grid (9th card, completing 3x3). Card text: 'AI Health Analysis Comparison Hub — Compare Copilot Health, Perplexity Health, ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini side-by-side.' Also updated sitemap lastmod for / (2026-06-26) and /analyze-health-data-ai/ (2026-06-25, was stale 2026-01-31).
expected_impact: Stronger internal PageRank signal from homepage (highest-traffic page, 132 sess/7d) to /ai-health-analysis/ cluster page (currently 0 sessions). Increases crawl frequency signal for freshly-modified AI cluster pages. Guides & Resources is high-visibility section above FAQ — click intent is high.

description: Added FAQPage schema (3 Q&As) + answer-first blocks (4/4 H2s) to analyze-health-data-ai/index.html. Citations: Apple Support, HealthKit docs, Statista, Nature npj Digital Medicine 2021. Added visible FAQ section. Updated dateModified to 2026-06-25.
expected_impact: Unlocks FAQPage rich result eligibility. Upgrades AF score from 0/4 to 4/4 with Tier 1-2 citations (+3.4x AI citation rate per GEO Research). Answers 'analyze Apple Health data with AI', 'HealthKit data types', and 'is it safe to upload health data to AI' queries for AI Overviews and Perplexity.
